title: Palestine
content:
Old plant of Asia - 
    Mutilated vine
    Holding earth's leaping sap
    In every stem and shoot
    That lopped off, sprouts again - 
    Why should you seek a plateau walled about,
    Whose garden is the world?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Lola Ridge, titled "Palestine", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
